column1: # G13 button definitions — single source of truth for signal detection and UI.
#   button_id    unique key used in profiles and routing maps
#   bit_index    position in the 40-bit USB HID bitmask (bytes 3–7 of the 8-byte report)
#                -1 = virtual button derived from joystick X/Y axis values
#   stick_axis   for virtual stick buttons: x or y axis  (empty for bitmask buttons)
#   stick_dir    for virtual stick buttons: low or high   (empty for bitmask buttons)
#   zone         UI grouping hint: key / lcd / mode / dpad / stick
# Bitmask layout confirmed by hardware test (debug_g13.py
#   byte 6 bit  0    : CIRCLE (small round button left of L/M row)
#   byte 7 bit  1    : LEFT (joystick rim click — arrives batched with stick reports)
#   byte 7 bit  7    : always-on hardware bit — omitted
